Description: Exposed old seabed, 0 to -2000m relative to new sea levels. Dense hyper-oxygenated greenhouse atmosphere; salt-crusted flats, petrified coral forests, hypersaline lakes.
Old PR main island (Cerro de Punta). Alpine cloud-forests, cold misty pine-shrub, vertical limestone cliffs with cave networks.
Puerto Rico Trench to the north. Ultra-deep hypersaline sea, sulfur mists, thermal evaporation cloud cover.
